name: Practice Management Specialists
description: Experienced team handling medical claims billing with expertise in coding review, insurance verification, and compatibility with major EHR and practice management software systems.
services: EHR and practice management software support

name: Precision Practice Management
description: Provides full range of revenue cycle solutions, medical coding, charge coding, credentialing, and technical support to medical practices throughout Maryland including Baltimore, Silver Spring, and Waldorf.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: pursued AR claims that would normally be written-off and was able to collect
stepped up and took control of the transition from our old billing service
generated normal collections in a short time

sentiment.summary: Highly positive reputation for proactive accounts receivable management, seamless service transitions, and delivering rapid revenue collection results.

name: Rowan Billing Services
description: Small, private medical billing service owned by Susan Mills, providing rapid, customized solutions for practices of all sizes over 15 years.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Rowan Billing has become so much more than a billing company...almost family
They go above and beyond and are always willing to help with great attitudes
I cannot imagine running my practice without their expertise and knowledge
It's a relief to reach someone without navigating automated systems and voicemails

sentiment.summary: Rowan Billing Services enjoys exceptional reputation with 16 uniformly positive reviews praising responsiveness, reliability, expertise, and personalized service in healthcare billing.
